entry.title: Replying to @manic.pixie.riotgrrrl as a Gothamite, Bruce Wayne is NOT Batman #gothamtok #gothamtiktok #gothamcity #gothamfyp #gotham

entry.title: I saw the TV glow #isawthetvglowmovie #isawthetvglow #transfemme #repression
entry.content: I saw the TV glow #isawthetvglowmovie #isawthetvglow #transfemme #repression

entry.title: lesbian bar discourse. I went to 3 funerals in a month earlier this year, and in the aftermath, watching as my pocket of community both tear itself apart and try to bring itself together was a really brutal lesson in community and power. I say in the vid
entry.content: lesbian bar discourse. I went to 3 funerals in a month earlier this year, and in the aftermath, watching as my pocket of community both tear itself apart and try to bring itself together was a really brutal lesson in community and power. I say in the vid

entry.title: #onthisday I think if I wrote this video today I would have used more cautious language around the "identity poker" line but idk, whatever #transfemme #protecttranslives #transcommunity #trans
entry.content: #onthisday I think if I wrote this video today I would have used more cautious language around the "identity poker" line but idk, whatever #transfemme #protecttranslives #transcommunity #trans

entry.title: should you vote? I will tell you. shout out to Olive Delights Restaurant for the support. that part about deep green resistance is true. #voting #leftism #environmentalism #olivedelights #amberiscuteandfunny
entry.content: should you vote? I will tell you. shout out to Olive Delights Restaurant for the support. that part about deep green resistance is true. #voting #leftism #environmentalism #olivedelights #amberiscuteandfunny

entry.title: any of those roommates reading this, hope y'all grown, not because I'm concerned for you, but because I'm concerned about the safety of the people and especially women who would be in proximity to you #environmentalism #amberiscuteandfunny #socialism #rev
entry.content: any of those roommates reading this, hope y'all grown, not because I'm concerned for you, but because I'm concerned about the safety of the people and especially women who would be in proximity to you #environmentalism #amberiscuteandfunny #socialism #rev

entry.title: The theodicy of Queer Christianity. I think I want to say that none of my videos I make them to be agreed with, I'd rather someone agree or disagree with me in a way that forces them to look at their core beliefs, then to just buy what I say unquestionabl
entry.content: The theodicy of Queer Christianity. I think I want to say that none of my videos I make them to be agreed with, I'd rather someone agree or disagree with me in a way that forces them to look at their core beliefs, then to just buy what I say unquestionabl
